title: Manage Timeline (Ticks)
postconditions: Timeline is updated with a new Tick or a modified historical Tick
trigger: GM creates a new Tick or selects an existing Tick to modify

main_scenario.action: GM creates a new Tick (milestone) or selects a historical Tick on the timeline
GM defines or updates the narrative context for that Tick
System cascades the state of all global assets (Scenes, NPCs) from the previous Tick into the current one
If modifying a historical Tick, System warns GM that changes will overwrite state in subsequent Ticks and requests confirmation
System updates the active state for the selected Tick and recalculates inheritance for any future Ticks

exceptions.condition: GM cancels the historical edit warning
exceptions.action: System reverts changes to the historical Tick and aborts the cascade

acceptance_criteria: A new Tick inherits the exact state of the previous Tick.
Modifying a past Tick automatically cascades those changes forward to all subsequent Ticks, overwriting conflicting states.
A warning is displayed before cascading historical changes.
